```{r}
library(knitr)

# Create your table (edit values directly)
table_data <- data.frame(
  Condition = c("Match vs non-match", "Residual", "Trial", "Residual", "Match vs non-match * Trial", "Residual"),
  Sum of Squares = c(0.204, 15.344, 6.035, 28.486, 0.400, 21.441),
  df = c(1, 15, 2, 30, 2, 30)
)

# Display table
kable(table_data)
